opinion.h: RUBIO v. UNITED STATES. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE SEVENTH CIRCUIT. No. 710, Misc. Decided May 15, 1967.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Marshall for the United States.
The motion for leave to proceed in forma pauperis and the petition for a writ of certiorari are granted. The judgment is reversed. Coppedge v. United States, 369 U.S. 438.
